name: ideal-exe-ai-ruleset
core_principles: Treat ViopHesapOku as real account state
Treat PozisyonKontrolOku as robot-local software state
Use fallback chains for price and UI-derived values
Always normalize Turkish numeric formats before parsing
Prefer logging and defensive try/catch blocks

normalization: strip trailing expiry digits when needed
map X030 and X030T style aliases to XU030 when comparing

numeric_rules.parse_strategy: normalize by treating the last separator as decimal when mixed or ambiguous
numeric_rules.position_strategy: treat position sizes as whole numbers unless clearly fractional

ui_rules.grid_matching: match by Name and HeaderText aliases instead of one exact string

safety_rules: Do not assume external processes can reliably read internal iDeal state
Keep a dry-run mode for trade logic
Log all critical branches and failures to file
Use null checks and try/catch around broker and UI calls
Do not mix real-account K/Z with software position counter without naming the source
